description: Billy (billy.dk) accounting: invoices, journal entries, trial balance, with write protection.
name: io.github.Thourum/billy-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Billy API access token (create at mit.billy.dk -> Settings -> Access tokens)
environmentVariables.name: BILLY_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Write protection: read-only, confirm (default, requires elicitation-capable host), or full
environmentVariables.name: BILLY_WRITE_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Billy organization ID (auto-resolved when the token maps to a single company)
environmentVariables.name: BILLY_ORGANIZATION_ID

environmentVariables.description: Response language: en_US, da_DK, fr_FR, nl_NL, or de_DE
environmentVariables.name: BILLY_LOCALE
